dashboard.contact_admin_assign: Contact the administrator to be assigned a clinic.

settings.settings_subtitle: Manage your account, profile, and global preferences.
settings.notifications_soon: Coming soon: Activity history and AI alerts.

admin.general_admin_subtitle: Manage clinics and platform administrators for GESTCLINIA
admin.no_clinics_subtitle: Create the first clinic and assign an administrator.
admin.admin_exists_error: This email is already an administrator
admin.protected_admins_desc: Administrators marked as 'Protected' cannot be removed from the system. They are the platform founders.

clinic_detail.no_patients_desc: Register the first patient to start managing their history.
clinic_detail.no_staff_desc: Add doctors or assistants to this clinic.
clinic_detail.access_from_patient_desc: To see detailed clinical history, select a patient from the list.

hero.description: Create and manage clinics in minutes. Each with its own virtual assistant, automated medical documentation, and professional management panel.

features.title: Everything your clinic needs
features.subtitle: Professional tools designed for the modern medical world.
features.multi_clinic_desc: Manage multiple clinics from a single panel. Each clinic has its own profile, team, and settings.
features.ai_assistant_desc: Each clinic has its own virtual assistant that understands its specialty, protocols, and care style.
features.medical_scribe_desc: Generate SOAP notes, discharge summaries, specialty documentation, and referral letters with AI.
features.scheduling_desc: Appointment system with schedule management, reminders, and automatic staff coordination.
features.hipaa_desc: Data security with RLS policies, encryption, and data separation by clinic.
features.patients_desc: Digital medical records, treatment tracking, and direct communication with patients.

steps.title: 3 steps to get started
steps.step_1_desc: Register your clinic with name, specialty, and hours. The system generates your complete profile.
steps.step_2_desc: Personalize the tone, responses, and capabilities of your medical virtual assistant.
steps.step_3_desc: Schedule appointments, document encounters, and manage patients with artificial intelligence.

cta.title: Your clinic deserves the best
cta.description: Start today and transform the way you manage your medical practice.
